message:
refactor(runtime-compat,mux-client,telemetry): consolidate runtime helpers and async telemetry collection

runtime_compat.rs:
- Add clear_runtime_handle() no-op for non-asupersync builds, enabling
  symmetric test teardown regardless of runtime backend
- Add mpsc_reserve_send() and mpsc_try_reserve_send() helpers that
  abstract over tokio vs asupersync channel reserve-then-send patterns
- Refactor all test functions from #[tokio::test] to the run_async_test
  pattern for consistent cross-runtime test execution
- Add additional test coverage for mpsc, watch, timeout, and sleep
  helpers

vendored/mux_client.rs:
- Replace all inline cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime") blocks with
  calls to runtime_compat helpers (mpsc_recv_option, mpsc_reserve_send,
  mpsc_try_reserve_send, watch_borrow_and_update_clone, watch_changed),
  reducing ~100 lines of duplicated conditional compilation
- Add test for stashed out-of-order response handling

telemetry.rs:
- Replace synchronous sample_once() in the collection loop with
  spawn_blocking + ResourceSnapshot::collect, preventing blocking I/O
  from stalling the async runtime during process stat collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
